biography: Hailing from Hirsala Golf, Jarkko is set to make his tenth appearance in the esteemed Hector Trophée at the 2026 edition. Known affectionately by many as "Bailando," his consistent presence and notable achievements have firmly established him as a significant and dynamic figure within this unique annual competition.

Jarkko's competitive journey is particularly distinguished by a rare dual accomplishment: he has not only secured the coveted Hector Trophée with his partner on one occasion, but he has also individually captured the prestigious Victor Trophy. This unique combination of team and solo triumphs underscores a comprehensive skill set and an ability to excel across both challenging formats of the tournament.

The nickname "Bailando" aptly reflects Jarkko's vibrant presence and spirited approach to the game, often bringing a noticeable energy and flair to the fairways. As he continues his active involvement in Hector events, his pursuit of further accolades in the Hector Trophée 2026 is keenly anticipated, promising another engaging chapter in his celebrated career in this esteemed tournament.
